top_signals.title: IMF says policy choices will determine whether tokenization strengthens or fragments the financial system
top_signals.summary: The IMF's Tobias Adrian said risks could shift from banks toward market infrastructure providers and smart contracts as tokenization expands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Pony beers, household chores robots, 'bare nails' trend, and a new screen-time helper: Lisa Mateo shares with David Gura and Christina Ruffini the headlines explaining these topics that you and they may have missed this week. Watch Bloomberg This Weekend, Saturday and Sundays 7am EST. (Source: Bloomberg)
